editionData.title: June 11, 2026: Trump says Iran will ‘pay the price’ after it targets U.S. assets in three countries; A new wave of anti-immigrant...
editionData.description: Global headlines: Trump says Iran will ‘pay the price’ after it targets U.S. assets in three countries (After Iran announced strikes targeting U.S. assets, the U.S. responded with tit-for-tat attacks Wednesday. Iranian media said that earlier U.S. strikes hit a water facility); A new wave of anti-immigrant violence hits U.K. as riots convulse Belfast (Attackers torched neighborhoods across Belfast, the capital of Northern Ireland, after a Sudanese asylum seeker was arrested and accused of stabbing a man); and Bad Bunny’s private audience: Latin trap megastar met Pope Leo in Spain (Bad Bunny and Pope Leo XIV may have radically different personas, but when it comes to pluralist visions, they are brothers in arms). Markets leaned lower, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes down; NASDAQ Composite down 1.98% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: AI agent runs amok in Fedora and elsewhere (Agentic AI systems can be used to do a variety of things autonomously on behalf of a human user [...]); Cybersecurity researchers aren't happy about the guardrails on Anthropic's Fable (Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work); and πFS (πfs - the data-free filesystem! Contribute to philipl/pifs development by creating an account on GitHub). Product Hunt features Hero Studio Photos (Snap one photo, get listing-ready shots from every angle), Publora (The publishing API for the agent era), and FluidDocs Deck Builder (Turn a prompt into a real HTML deck).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Trump says Iran will ‘pay the price’ after it targets U.S. assets in three countries
headlines.summary: After Iran announced strikes targeting U.S. assets, the U.S. responded with tit-for-tat attacks Wednesday. Iranian media said that earlier U.S. strikes hit a water facility.

headlines.title: A new wave of anti-immigrant violence hits U.K. as riots convulse Belfast
headlines.summary: Attackers torched neighborhoods across Belfast, the capital of Northern Ireland, after a Sudanese asylum seeker was arrested and accused of stabbing a man.

headlines.title: Bad Bunny’s private audience: Latin trap megastar met Pope Leo in Spain
headlines.summary: Bad Bunny and Pope Leo XIV may have radically different personas, but when it comes to pluralist visions, they are brothers in arms.

headlines.title: Why rescue donkeys are wearing donated socks from a pro soccer team
headlines.summary: Socks from Arsenal Football Club have a new life helping rescued donkeys and horses heal from injuries.

headlines.title: Mamdani was to meet with Colombia’s leader until Trump administration stepped in
headlines.summary: New York’s mayor had planned to meet with leftist Colombian President Gustavo Petro while he was in town for U.N. events, but the State Department nixed it.

headlines.title: Tehran targets US bases in Gulf after Iran attacked for second day
headlines.summary: Iran remains defiant amid US attacks, orders complete closure of Strait of Hormuz to all vessels.

headlines.title: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait and ships in Hormuz after new US strikes
headlines.summary: Tehran claims drone strikes on bases in Bahrain and Kuwait, as US strikes Qeshm Island and ports along Hormuz.

headlines.title: Trial begins for man accused of sparking Palisades Fire in California
headlines.summary: Prosecutors say man deliberately started blaze that became one of the most destructive wildfires in Los Angeles history.

headlines.title: ‘Negotiate with bombs’: Hegseth defends second night of US strikes on Iran
headlines.summary: US Central Command has described the attacks as a result of 'Iran’s unwarranted and continued aggression'.

headlines.title: Trump directs interim US intelligence chief Bill Pulte to downsize agency
headlines.summary: Interim ODNI chief Bill Pulte has been slammed by Democrats as a Donald Trump loyalist with no intelligence background.

headlines.title: FBI seizing evidence at California plant where chemical tank overheated
headlines.summary: Federal authorities served a search warrant on Wednesday at a Southern California aerospace facility where a chemical tank overheated last month, forcing 50,000 residents to evacuate because authorities feared an explosion.

headlines.title: U.S. military says it's striking 'multiple targets' in Iran in 2nd day of renewed fire
headlines.summary: The escalating attacks threatened to derail efforts to end the war, with President Trump warning that Tehran would "pay the price" for stalled negotiations.

headlines.title: Somali World Cup referee denied U.S. entry, hailed as hero at home
headlines.summary: A World Cup dream denied — Somali referee Omar Artan receives a hero's welcome at home after being blocked from entering the United States and taking part in the World Cup.

headlines.title: Veterans and relatives see no place for Trump's arch near Arlington National Cemetery
headlines.summary: Three Vietnam War veterans are suing to stop President Trump from building an arch just steps from Arlington National Cemetery, where 400,000 service members, veterans and their relatives are buried.

headlines.title: Report: ICE wasted millions, endangered detainees in largest immigration facility
headlines.summary: Since the opening of Camp East Montana in Texas last year, immigration lawyers and rights advocates have expressed concerns about conditions inside the facility.

headlines.title: May heat wave marks 'new normal': agency
headlines.summary: Last month ranked as the world's second-warmest May on record, showing how quickly climate extremes have become "the new normal", the European Union's climate monitoring service said.

headlines.title: DR Congo Ebola cases rise to 635, recoveries reach 30: health minister
headlines.summary: KINSHASA -- The number of confirmed Ebola cases in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has risen to 635 as of June 9, Health Minister Roger Kamba said Wednesday.

headlines.title: Bill Gates tells US Congress Epstein tried to blackmail him over extramarital affairs
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON -- Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates told US Congress on Wednesday that his extramarital affairs "had nothing to do" with his interactions with Jeffrey Epstein and the late financier tried to blackmail him with information about them.

headlines.title: End war through Love, not through war: a Lesson from ancient Roman Empire
headlines.summary: The ancient Roman Empire once revered Mars, the god of war, achieving only a temporary form of "peace through war." However, after turning to worship Venus, the god of love, it entered a period of lasting stability known as the Pax Romana, which endured for nearly 200 years.

headlines.title: Iranian, US forces clash as Iran announces full closure of Hormuz
headlines.summary: TEHRAN -- Clashes erupted early Thursday between Iranian and US forces in the waters of the Gulf and the Gulf of Oman, as Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, Iran's main military command, announced the full closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: NDA hails Modi as longest serving continuously elected Prime Minister
headlines.summary: NDA leaders commend Modi as India's longest-serving Prime Minister, celebrating his leadership and government achievements over 12 years.

headlines.title: Congress to move Supreme Court against rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan’s Rajya Sabha nomination
headlines.summary: Congress deems Returning Officer's rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan's RS nomination as unlawful, urging the Election Commission to overturn it.

headlines.title: Anyone who wants to see Rahul as PM can join Congress: W.B. Congress chief
headlines.summary: West Bengal Congress chief invites supporters of Rahul Gandhi for PM to join Congress amid TMC merger speculation.

headlines.title: Rahul Gandhi meets Abhishek Banerjee amid push for INDIA bloc coordination
headlines.summary: Rahul Gandhi meets Abhishek Banerjee to enhance coordination within the INDIA bloc amid ongoing political developments and unity efforts.

headlines.title: ‘Gross abuse of process of law’: HC quashes Delhi Police, ED cases against NewsClick
headlines.summary: Delhi High Court quashes cases against NewsClick, deeming them a gross abuse of legal process, affirming no criminal wrongdoing.

headlines.title: Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz after US attacks
headlines.summary: Reuters: Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz after US attacks.

headlines.title: Hegseth: US to bomb 'key facilities' in Iran on Wednesday
headlines.summary: Reuters: Hegseth: US to bomb 'key facilities' in Iran on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Albania protests swell as opposition to Kushner resort persists
headlines.summary: Reuters: Albania protests swell as opposition to Kushner resort persists.

headlines.title: Focus: China's control over indium phosphide exports threatens AI data centre rollout
headlines.summary: Reuters: Focus: China's control over indium phosphide exports threatens AI data centre rollout.

headlines.title: 'I love the inflation,' Trump says as prices rise amid Iran war
headlines.summary: Reuters: 'I love the inflation,' Trump says as prices rise amid Iran war.

hackerNews.summary: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

hackerNews.title: Sequoyah’s syllabary created a written language for the Cherokee
hackerNews.summary: Sequoyah’s syllabary faced suspicion initially, but after a demonstration, his version of “talking leaves” was widely embraced. And then the word spread

hackerNews.title: How JPL keeps the 13-year-old Curiosity rover doing science
hackerNews.summary: It takes some special tricks to maintain a robot 200 million kilometers from home

hackerNews.title: PgDog is funded and coming to a database near you
hackerNews.summary: PgDog is a connection pooler, load balancer, and sharding proxy for PostgreSQL. Scale Postgres horizontally without rewriting your application.

hackerNews.title: GeoLibre 1.0
hackerNews.summary: A lightweight, cloud-native GIS platform for visualizing, exploring, and analyzing geospatial data across desktop and web environments, with a responsive layout for mobile screens.

hackerNews.title: Show HN: Extend UI – open-source UI kit for modern document apps
hackerNews.summary: React components for PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and CSV, with bounding box citations, file upload, e-signing, and more.

hackerNews.title: What is it like to be a bat? (1974) [pdf]
